Connect to your own Umami instance using: Connect to your own Umami instance using the same credentials you use to log in to your dashboard.
Connect to Umami Cloud using an API key. Create one in **Settings → API Keys**.
Base URL of your Umami instance (e.g. `h: Base URL of your Umami instance (e.g. `https://umami.example.com`). Do not include a trailing slash.
Your Umami Cloud API key from Settings →: Your Umami Cloud API key from Settings → API Keys.
Returns a summary of visitors, pageviews: Returns a summary of visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, and average visit duration for a date range.
Returns a ranked list for a chosen metri: Returns a ranked list for a chosen metric category (e.g. top pages, browsers, or countries) over a date range.
Returns the number of people currently b: Returns the number of people currently browsing a website in real time.
Returns pageview and session counts over: Returns pageview and session counts over time, broken down by hour, day, week, month, or year.
Records a custom event or pageview on a: Records a custom event or pageview on a website. Leave the event name blank to track a plain pageview.
Returns all websites tracked in your Uma: Returns all websites tracked in your Umami account.
Triggers when a new custom event is reco: Triggers when a new custom event is recorded on a website.
Triggers when a new visitor session is d: Triggers when a new visitor session is detected on a website.
Which metric to rank results by.
Maximum number of results to return.
Maximum number of websites to return.
How to bucket the results over time.
Timezone for date grouping, e.g. Europe/: Timezone for date grouping, e.g. Europe/Paris or America/New_York. Defaults to UTC.
Path of the page to record, e.g. /pricin: Path of the page to record, e.g. /pricing.
Name of the custom event, e.g. signup-bu: Name of the custom event, e.g. signup-button-click. Leave blank to record a pageview.
Extra key-value pairs to attach to the e: Extra key-value pairs to attach to the event.
Title of the page being recorded.
